name: Wrath of Towers
short_description: In this game, your task will be to create a reliable defense that can withstand the onslaught of enemies. You will have to build various towers that will help you hold back the enemy advance.
detailed_description:
We are pleased to present you a game that will take you into an exciting world of battles and strategic decisions! In this magical world where magic and treasure are commonplace, you will face a threat like you have never seen before. Crowds of magical skeletons hungry for gold threaten to destroy your well-being. Don't let them achieve their goal!
In this game, your task will be to create a reliable defense that can withstand the onslaught of enemies. You will have to build various towers that will help you hold back the enemy advance. Your goal is to survive as long as possible and set a new record.
Immerse yourself in an atmosphere of excitement and strategy! Improve your army, build more towers, develop your own tactics. All this will help you protect your wealth from enemies. Let your name become a legend in this world of magic and battles!
